content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 has user-visible string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag user-facing "Experimental" language as implying an unfinished feature, which can trigger review questions under 2.2 even though this isn't a beta build per se. It's a real feature disclaimer, not dev-log text, so it's in scope. Consider rewording to something like "May occasionally change sort order" to avoid signaling incompleteness while still warning users.
